---
title: "tacfaSM"
output: html_document
---

# Generative Model for $y_{ij}$

$$
\begin{align*}
\phi_j &\sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_\phi, \sigma_\phi^2), 
\quad j = 1, \dots, J \\

\rho &\sim \text{Beta}(a_\rho, b_\rho) \\

R_{ll'} &=
\begin{cases}
1 & \text{if } l = l' \\
\rho & \text{if } l \neq l'
\end{cases}
\quad \text{for } l, l' = 1, \dots, L \\

\sigma_j^2 &\sim \text{Inv-Gamma}(a_{\sigma^2}, b_{\sigma^2}), 
\quad j = 1, \dots, J \\

\mu_j &\sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_0, \sigma_\mu^2), 
\quad j = 1, \dots, J \\

f_i \mid R &\sim \mathcal{N}(0, R), 
\quad i = 1, \dots, N, \quad f_i \in \mathbb{R}^L \\

y_{ij} \mid \mu_j, f_i, \phi_j, \sigma_j^2 
&\sim \mathcal{N}\bigl(\mu_j + \phi_j\, f_{i,\lambda(j)}, \sigma_j^2\bigr), \\
&\quad i = 1, \dots, N,\; j = 1, \dots, J, \quad \lambda(j) \in \{1, \dots, L\}
\end{align*}
$$

# Generative Model for $w_{im}$

$$
\begin{align*}
\gamma_{lk} &\sim \mathcal{N}(\mu_\gamma, \sigma_\gamma^2), 
\quad l = 1, \dots, L,\; k = 1, \dots, K-1 \\

\gamma_k &\in \mathbb{R}^L, \quad \delta_K = 0,\; \gamma_K = 0 \\

\theta_{ik} &= \frac{\exp\bigl(\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k\bigr)}
{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp\bigl(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'}\bigr)}, 
\quad i = 1, \dots, N,\; k = 1, \dots, K \\

z_{im} \mid \theta_i &\sim \text{Multinomial}(1, \theta_i), 
\quad m = 1, \dots, M_i,\; i = 1, \dots, N \\

\psi_{\mathcal{V}',k} &\text{ is fixed}, \quad 
c_k = \sum_{v \in \mathcal{V}'} \psi_{vk} \\

\tilde{\psi}_{\mathcal{V},k} 
&\sim \text{Dirichlet}(\beta_{\mathcal{V}}), 
\quad k = 1, \dots, K \\

\psi_{vk} 
&= (1 - c_k)\, \tilde{\psi}_{vk}, 
\quad v \in \mathcal{V} \\

\psi_k 
&= (\psi_{\mathcal{V},k}, \psi_{\mathcal{V}',k}) \\

w_{im} \mid z_{imk} = 1 
&\sim \text{Multinomial}(1, \psi_k), 
\quad m = 1, \dots, M_i,\; i = 1, \dots, N
\end{align*}
$$

# CFA Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align*}
f(Y \mid F, \boldsymbol{\phi}, \boldsymbol{\mu}, \boldsymbol{\sigma^2})
&= \prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{j=1}^J 
\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi \sigma_j^2}} 
\exp\left\{ -\frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2} 
\left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2 \right\} \\[8pt]

&= \left[ \prod_{j=1}^J \left( \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi \sigma_j^2}} \right)^N \right]
\exp\left\{ 
- \sum_{j=1}^J \frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2} 
\sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2 
\right\}
\end{align*}
$$

# LDA Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align*}
f(W \mid F, \Gamma, Z, \Psi)
&= \left[
\prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{m=1}^{M_i} \prod_{k=1}^K \prod_{v=1}^V 
\psi_{vk}^{\,w_{imv} z_{imk}}
\right]
\left[
\prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{m=1}^{M_i} \prod_{k=1}^K 
\left(
\frac{\exp(\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k)}
{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'})}
\right)^{z_{imk}}
\right] \\[10pt]

&= \left[
\prod_{v=1}^V \prod_{k=1}^K 
\psi_{vk}^{\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} w_{imv} z_{imk}}
\right]
\left[
\prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{k=1}^K 
\left(
\frac{\exp(\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k)}
{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'})}
\right)^{\sum_{m=1}^{M_i} z_{imk}}
\right]
\end{align*}
$$

# Full Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align*}
&f(Y, W \mid F, \boldsymbol{\phi}, \boldsymbol{\mu}, \boldsymbol{\sigma^2}, \Gamma, Z, \Psi) = \\[10pt]
&\quad \left[
\prod_{j=1}^J \left( \frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi \sigma_j^2}} \right)^N
\right]
\exp\left\{
- \sum_{j=1}^J \frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2}
\sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2
\right\} \\[10pt]

&\quad \times
\left[
\prod_{v=1}^V \prod_{k=1}^K
\psi_{vk}^{\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} w_{imv} z_{imk}}
\right] \\[10pt]

&\quad \times
\left[
\prod_{i=1}^N \prod_{k=1}^K
\left(
\frac{\exp(\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k)}
{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'})}
\right)^{\sum_{m=1}^{M_i} z_{imk}}
\right]
\end{align*}
$$
# Full Log-Likelihood

$$
\begin{align*}
\log f(Y, W \mid F, \boldsymbol{\phi}, \boldsymbol{\mu}, \boldsymbol{\sigma^2}, \Gamma, Z, \Psi)
&= -\frac{N}{2} \sum_{j=1}^J \log(2\pi \sigma_j^2) \\[8pt]
&\quad - \sum_{j=1}^J \frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2}
\sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2 \\[8pt]

&\quad + \sum_{v=1}^V \sum_{k=1}^K
\left( \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} w_{imv} z_{imk} \right)
\log \psi_{vk} \\[8pt]

&\quad + \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{k=1}^K
\left( \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} z_{imk} \right)
\left[
\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k
- \log \left( \sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'}) \right)
\right] \\[8pt]
&= -\frac{N}{2} \sum_{j=1}^J \log(\sigma_j^2)
- \sum_{i=1}^N \Bigg[
\sum_{j=1}^J \frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2}
\left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2 \\
&\hspace{4.5cm}
- \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} \log\!\left( \psi_{w_{im}}^\top \theta_i \right)
\Bigg]
\end{align*}
$$

where

$$
\theta_{ik}
= \frac{\exp(\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k)}
{\sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'})}
$$

# Priors

## Prior for $\mu_j$

$$
\pi(\mu_j)
\propto \exp\left\{
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\mu^2} (\mu_j - \mu_0)^2
\right\}
\quad \text{(Normal; conjugate)}
$$

## Prior for $\sigma_j^2$

$$
\pi(\sigma_j^2)
\propto (\sigma_j^2)^{-(a_{\sigma^2} + 1)}
\exp\left\{
-\frac{b_{\sigma^2}}{\sigma_j^2}
\right\}
\quad \text{(Inverse-Gamma; conjugate)}
$$

## Prior for $\phi_j$

$$
\pi(\phi_j)
\propto \exp\left\{
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\phi^2} (\phi_j - \mu_\phi)^2
\right\} \, \mathbf{1}[\phi_j > 0]
\quad \text{(Normal, truncated; conjugate)}
$$

## Prior for $\rho$

$$
\pi(\rho)
\propto \rho^{a_\rho - 1} (1 - \rho)^{b_\rho - 1}
\quad \text{(Beta; requires MH)}
$$

## Prior for $\boldsymbol{f}_i$

$$
\pi(f_i)
\propto \exp\left\{
-\frac{1}{2} f_i^\top R^{-1} f_i
\right\}
\quad \text{(Multivariate normal; requires MH)}
$$

## Prior for $\delta_k$

$$
\pi(\delta_k)
\propto \exp\left\{
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\delta^2} (\delta_k - \mu_\delta)^2
\right\}
\quad \text{(Normal; requires MH)}
$$

## Prior for $\gamma_{lk}$

$$
\pi(\gamma_{lk})
\propto \exp\left\{
-\frac{1}{2\sigma_\gamma^2} (\gamma_{lk} - \mu_\gamma)^2
\right\}
\quad \text{(Normal; requires MH)}
$$

## Prior for $\boldsymbol{\beta}_{\mathcal{V},k}$

$$
\begin{align*}
\pi(\tilde{\psi}_{\mathcal{V},k} \mid \beta_{\mathcal{V}})
&\propto \prod_{v \in \mathcal{V}} \tilde{\psi}_{vk}^{\,\beta_{vk} - 1}
\quad \text{(Dirichlet; conjugate)} \\[6pt]

\psi_{vk} 
&= (1 - c_k)\, \tilde{\psi}_{vk}, 
\quad c_k = \sum_{v \in \mathcal{V}'} \psi_{vk}
\end{align*}
$$

# Full Conditionals

## Full Conditional for $\mu_j$

$$
\begin{align*}
\mu_j \mid \cdot 
&\sim \mathcal{N}(m_j, V_j)
\end{align*}
$$

$$
\begin{align*}
V_j 
&= \left( \frac{N}{\sigma_j^2} + \frac{1}{\sigma_\mu^2} \right)^{-1} \\[6pt]

m_j 
&= V_j \left[
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2} \sum_{i=1}^N \left(y_{ij} - \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)}\right)
+ \frac{\mu_0}{\sigma_\mu^2}
\right]
\end{align*}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\sigma_j^2$

$$
\begin{align*}
\sigma_j^2 \mid \cdot 
&\sim \text{Inv-Gamma}\left(a_{\sigma^2} + \frac{N}{2},\;
b_{\sigma^2} + \frac{1}{2} \sum_{i=1}^N 
\left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2
\right)
\end{align*}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\phi_j$

$$
\begin{align*}
\phi_j \mid \cdot 
&\sim \mathcal{N}(m_j, V_j)\, \mathbf{1}[\phi_j > 0]
\end{align*}
$$

$$
\begin{align*}
V_j 
&= \left(
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2} \sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda(j)}^2
+ \frac{1}{\sigma_\phi^2}
\right)^{-1} \\[6pt]

m_j 
&= V_j \left[
\frac{1}{\sigma_j^2} \sum_{i=1}^N f_{i,\lambda(j)} (y_{ij} - \mu_j)
+ \frac{\mu_\phi}{\sigma_\phi^2}
\right]
\end{align*}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\rho$

$$
\begin{align*}
\log \pi(\rho \mid \cdot)
&\propto (a_\rho - 1)\log \rho + (b_\rho - 1)\log(1 - \rho) \\
&\quad - \frac{N}{2} \left[
(L-1)\log(1 - \rho) + \log\big(1 + (L-1)\rho\big)
\right] \\
&\quad - \frac{1}{2} \sum_{i=1}^N \left[
\frac{1}{1 - \rho} \|f_i\|^2
- \frac{\rho}{(1 - \rho)(1 + (L-1)\rho)} (\mathbf{1}^\top f_i)^2
\right]
\end{align*}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{f}_i$

$$
\begin{align*}
\log \pi(f_i \mid \cdot)
&\propto -\frac{1}{2} f_i^\top R^{-1} f_i \\[6pt]

&\quad - \sum_{j=1}^J \frac{1}{2\sigma_j^2}
\left(y_{ij} - (\mu_j + \phi_j f_{i,\lambda(j)})\right)^2 \\[6pt]

&\quad + \sum_{k=1}^K n_{ik}
\left[
f_i^\top \gamma_k + \delta_k
- \log \left( \sum_{k'=1}^K \exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'}) \right)
\right]
\end{align*}
$$

where

$$
n_{ik} = \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} z_{imk}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\delta_k$

$$
\begin{align*}
\log \pi(\boldsymbol{\delta} \mid \cdot)
&\propto 
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{k=1}^K n_{ik} (\delta_k + f_i^\top \gamma_k) \\[6pt]

&\quad - \sum_{i=1}^N M_i 
\log \left( \sum_{k'=1}^K 
\exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'}) \right) \\[6pt]

&\quad - \frac{1}{2\sigma_\delta^2} 
\sum_{k=1}^K (\delta_k - \mu_\delta)^2
\end{align*}
$$

where

$$
n_{ik} = \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} z_{imk}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\gamma_{lk}$

$$
\begin{align*}
\log \pi(\Gamma \mid \cdot)
&\propto 
\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{k=1}^K n_{ik} \, f_i^\top \gamma_k \\[6pt]

&\quad - \sum_{i=1}^N M_i 
\log \left( \sum_{k'=1}^K 
\exp(\delta_{k'} + f_i^\top \gamma_{k'}) \right) \\[6pt]

&\quad - \frac{1}{2\sigma_\gamma^2}
\sum_{k=1}^K \sum_{l=1}^L (\gamma_{lk} - \mu_\gamma)^2
\end{align*}
$$

## Full Conditional for $\boldsymbol{\psi}_{\mathcal{V},k}$

$$
\begin{align*}
n_{vk} 
&= \sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{m=1}^{M_i} w_{imv} z_{imk} \\[6pt]

\tilde{\psi}_{\mathcal{V},k} \mid \cdot
&\sim \text{Dirichlet}\bigl(\beta_{\mathcal{V}} + n_{vk}\bigr) \\[6pt]

\psi_{vk}
&= (1 - c_k)\, \tilde{\psi}_{vk}, 
\quad v \in \mathcal{V}, \quad
c_k = \sum_{v \in \mathcal{V}'} \psi_{vk}
\end{align*}
$$
